## Risk / rollback

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title is a Conventional Commit (`type(scope): subject`, lowercase subject)
- [ ] Targets the correct base branch (`stage` for work, `main` only for releases)
- [ ] Lint / tests pass locally (`just check`, `just test`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior changed
